title: Multi-Consumer Isolation and Platform Operations
description: Run independent Enki consumers concurrently and prove workload isolation, purpose limitation, contention handling, telemetry, incident response, portability, and deterministic recovery.
acceptance_criteria: Concurrent product-suite workloads cannot leak authority or protected data across consumer boundaries
Tenant, namespace, subject, domain, audience, purpose, and execution-context isolation survive contention
Retry, rollback, duplicate work, delayed delivery, and recovery preserve exact receipts and canonical authority
Privacy-preserving telemetry detects interference without exposing protected payloads
Multi-consumer state reconstructs deterministically after failure
